query: My payment of $149.99 to Netflix is showing as pending for 3 days. Is this normal?
resolution: Your $149.99 Netflix payment is pending due to standard bank processing (1-3 business days). It will clear by tomorrow. No action needed.

query: I was charged twice for my Amazon order #112-3456789 for $299. I need a refund for the duplicate charge.
resolution: Duplicate charges for Amazon orders are typically auto-reversed within 3-5 business days. If the duplicate hasn't reversed by March 6, please contact Amazon support directly with order #112-3456789.

query: Someone made an unauthorized transaction of $500 on my account. I did not authorize this. This is fraud.
resolution: Your query has been escalated to a specialist for immediate review.

query: My Spotify payment of $50 failed but I was still charged. I want to dispute this.
resolution: Your query has been escalated to a specialist for review. You will be contacted within 24 hours.

query: What is the spending limit on my account?
resolution: Standard account spending limits are $2,500/day for debit and $5,000/day for credit. For personalized limit details, log into your account portal or contact support via the app.

query: I see a charge of $12.99 from a company I don't recognize — ACME DIGITAL INC. What is this?
resolution: ACME DIGITAL INC is a common billing descriptor for digital subscription services. Check your subscriptions for any $12.99/month service. If unrecognized, you can initiate a dispute through Settings → Transactions → Dispute.

query: Can I make a payment on a Sunday and have it process the same day?
resolution: Payments initiated on Sundays are queued and begin processing on Monday. ACH transfers take 1-3 business days from Monday. Card payments may show faster, typically next business day.

query: Has my Best Buy order payment of $1200 been processed?
resolution: Your $1,200 Best Buy payment is currently in pending status as of March 4. Large transactions over $500 may take an additional 1-2 business days for security verification. Expected to clear by March 7.
